notes.marketing_site: gethasp.com stays in the canonical source repo.
notes.cloud_control_plane: app.gethasp.com is reserved for V3 and stays private.
notes.public_docs_scope: Only the operator, install, release, production, and profile docs required for the local product surface are exported here.
notes.canonical_manifest: The canonical source repo keeps the canonical export manifest under .github/public-export-manifest.json. This file is the public contract summary.
